faq.question: How much does it cost to ship a car?
faq.answer: Costs vary based on distance, vehicle size, transport method, route demand, and timing. A short local move may be much less expensive than a cross-country shipment, and expedited service typically costs more.

faq.question: Do you offer door-to-door service?
faq.answer: Yes, our carriers pick up and deliver as close to your requested addresses as safely and legally possible, in most cases directly at your door.

faq.question: How long does auto transport take?
faq.answer: Transit times depend on distance, route availability, weather, and carrier schedules. Shorter routes may take a few days, while longer interstate moves can take several days to a week or more.

faq.question: Can I put personal items in my car?
faq.answer: Most carriers allow a small amount of personal items in the trunk, generally under 100 lbs, but this is not covered by insurance. Check with your carrier before shipment.

faq.question: Is my vehicle insured during transport?
faq.answer: Yes, every carrier in our network carries cargo insurance that covers your vehicle during transport. We can provide proof of insurance upon request.

faq.question: What types of vehicles do you transport?
faq.answer: We transport sedans, SUVs, trucks, motorcycles, classic and exotic cars, as well as non-running vehicles and heavy equipment.
